nasb.text: They also struck down those who owned livestock, and they carried away large numbers of sheep and camels. Then they returned to Jerusalem.

esv.text: And they struck down the tents of those who had livestock and carried away sheep in abundance and camels. Then they returned to Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 他們又毀壞了牲畜的棚，牽走了很多的羊和駱駝，然後回耶路撒冷去了。

ccb.text: 他们毁坏牲畜的围栏，抢走许多羊和骆驼，然后返回耶路撒冷。
